hero.sub: Python and Java dual tracks — fundamentals, OOP, projects, and advanced topics (AI or data structures) — guiding you step by step to ship real work.

map.title: Four stages, step by step
map.sub: Each language is structured into four complete stages — from basics to advanced applications.

tutor.name: Reena Tsai
tutor.bio: A senior software engineer with hands-on industry and teaching experience. Reena breaks complex concepts into clear steps and leads students through plenty of practice and projects — so everyone actually writes code and ships work.

pricing.title: Choose your plan
pricing.sub: Reach out for exact pricing and scheduling.

cta.title: Ready to start coding?
cta.sub: Book a free consultation and get a learning path tailored to your goals and level.

plans.name: Private Class
plans.tagline: Fully 1-on-1, built around your goals and pace

plans.name: Group Class
plans.tagline: Learn with peers on a structured weekly schedule

faqs.q: Can I learn with zero experience?
faqs.a: Yes. Level 1 is designed for absolute beginners — from setup to basic syntax, step by step. No prior coding needed.

faqs.q: Should I start with Python or Java?
faqs.a: Python is concise and beginner-friendly; Java is strongly typed and great for exams or building Android apps. We can decide together during your consultation.
Classes are 1-on-1 with flexible timing arranged around your needs. Book a free consultation to learn more.

faqs.q: What will I be able to build?
faqs.a: Python Level 3 covers data visualization and web projects; Level 4 adds machine learning models. Java Level 4 covers AWT desktop apps or Android development.

levels.title: Programming Fundamentals
levels.desc: Start from zero — environment setup, variables, control flow and functions to build solid programming logic.

levels.title: Object-Oriented
levels.desc: Think in classes and objects — encapsulation, inheritance and polymorphism for clean, reusable code.

levels.title: Project Development
levels.desc: Put it all together — data visualization, web development, APIs, and Git version control to build a portfolio-ready project.

levels.title: Artificial Intelligence
levels.desc: Learn the full ML pipeline — data preprocessing, feature engineering and model training — plus an intro to neural networks and deep learning.

levels.title: Programming Fundamentals
levels.desc: Install the JDK, learn strongly-typed syntax, control flow, arrays and methods for a solid base.

levels.title: Object-Oriented Programming
levels.desc: Master Java OOP — from classes, encapsulation and constructors through to inheritance, interfaces and abstract classes.

levels.title: Data Structures & Algorithms
levels.desc: Learn recursion, sorting, and data structures with complexity analysis — essential for interviews and advanced development.

levels.title: Project Development
levels.desc: From AWT desktop apps to Android development — event handling and UI design to ship a working app.
